attributes.Sql Query:
-- SQ_W_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE --
SELECT
  SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,(CASE WHEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) WHEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN COALESCE(NP2.ITEM_KEY,-998) ELSE -998 END) AS PRODUCT_KEY  /*Added as part of for CDC Q4FY18 */                
  ,CASE WHEN NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ='UNKNOWN'  THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'  END RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_ROLE       
  ,SORCTL.UOM_CODE RU_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE       
  ,SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE RU_UNIT_STD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT   
  ,SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY             
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT          
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT      
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY            
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT         
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     
  ,NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' END AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   
  ,CASE WHEN SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL THEN 'MONEY ONLY' ELSE 'PRODUCT' END MONEY_ONLY_TYPE               
  ,SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
  ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE  
  ,USER
  ,USER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
  ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4
  ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3
  ,SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION   
  /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
  , CASE WHEN 
  EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
  OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE ('OM-FBINV%')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
   THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
   WHEN (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ')
        AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN('SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
        AND  SORCTL.REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER'  ) THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') ELSE NULL END RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_START_DT
	 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
  , CASE WHEN EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
  OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE ('OM-FBINV%')
   /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
   THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
   WHEN (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ')
        AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN('SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
        AND  SORCTL.REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER'  )
     THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') ELSE NULL 
     END RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_END_DT
 
  /* OA Q3FY13 ->>> */
  , COALESCE(CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' AND  NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') 
   THEN 0.000000 
        WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') 
		AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('Top SKU' , 'Top SKU - Exception') /* OA Q4FY13 -<<< */
   THEN SOR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT*(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE8/100 )
  ELSE 0.000000 END,0.000000) AS RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT       
  , COALESCE(CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM') 
   THEN 0.000000 
        WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM') 
		AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('Top SKU', 'Top SKU - Exception') /* OA Q4FY13 -<<< */
   THEN SOR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT*(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE8/100 ) 
  ELSE 0.000000 END,0.000000) AS RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT
  , CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND  SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' THEN 'Y'  
  WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND  (SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 <> 'Top SKU' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'N'
  ELSE '=' END WITH_PARENT_ROLE
  , CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 = 'Top SKU - Exception' THEN 'N'  /* OA Q4FY13 -<<< */
  WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N' END AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG 
  , CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 <> 'Top SKU - Exception' THEN SATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,'UNKNOWN' EXCEPTION_REASON_CD  /* MODIFICATION AS PART OF SOT OA Q4FY16 */
 /* OA Q3FY13 <<<- */
  ,1 AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT
  , SORCTL.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                   
  ,'I' DML_TYPE            
  FROM
   $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT
  ON (EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AND EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME=SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
  
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
                                                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    
	ON (SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
     ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')  /*Added as part of for CDC Q4FY18 */
   
   
  INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR
   ON (SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
   AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
   ON (SORR.NAME = NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME)
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
   ON (NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
 /* OA Q3FY13 ->>> */
   LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOR
  ON SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SOR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 = SOR.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6
   LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL1
  ON(SOR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL1.SS_CODE)
 /* OA Q3FY13 -<<< */
 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
   ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
   
  WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') <> 'FREIGHT' /*Added as part of for CDC Q4FY18 */
  
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,(CASE WHEN EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) WHEN EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN COALESCE(NP2.ITEM_KEY,-998) ELSE -998 END) AS PRODUCT_KEY   /*Added as part of for CDC Q4FY18 */                 
  ,CASE WHEN NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ='UNKNOWN'  THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'  END RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_ROLE       
  ,EORCTLI.UOM_CODE RU_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE       
  ,EORCTLI.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE RU_UNIT_STD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT   
  ,EORCTLI.RULE_START_DATE RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EORCTLI.QUANTITY_INVOICED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY             
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EORCTLI.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT          
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EORCTLI.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT      
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTLI.QUANTITY_CREDITED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY            
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTLI.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT         
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTLI.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     
  ,NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
  ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' END AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   
  ,CASE WHEN EORCTLI.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL THEN 'MONEY ONLY' ELSE 'PRODUCT' END MONEY_ONLY_TYPE               
  ,EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
  ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE   
  ,USER
  ,USER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
  ,EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE4
  ,EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE3
  ,EORCTLI.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION            
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/  
  , CASE WHEN EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
  OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE ANY ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','OM-FBINV%')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
   THEN CAST(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
   WHEN (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ')
        AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN('SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
        AND  EORCTLI.REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER'  ) THEN CAST(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') ELSE NULL END RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_START_DT
     	 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
  , CASE WHEN EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
  OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE ANY ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','OM-FBINV%')
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CCE */
   THEN CAST(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
   WHEN (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ')
        AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN('SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
        AND  EORCTLI.REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER'  )
     THEN CAST(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') ELSE NULL 
     END RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_END_DT
  /* OA Q3FY13 ->>> */
  , COALESCE(CASE WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' AND  NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') 
   THEN 0.000000
        WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') 
		AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('Top SKU' , 'Top SKU - Exception') /* OA Q4FY13 -<<< */
   THEN SOR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT*(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE8/100 )
  ELSE 0.000000 END,0.000000) AS RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT       
  , COALESCE(CASE WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM') 
   THEN 0.000000
        WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM') 
		AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('Top SKU', 'Top SKU - Exception')  /* OA Q4FY13 -<<< */
   THEN SOR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT*(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE8/100 ) 
  ELSE 0.000000 END,0.000000) AS RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT
  , CASE WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND  EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' THEN 'Y'  
  WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND  (EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 <> 'Top SKU' AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'N'
  ELSE '=' END WITH_PARENT_ROLE
  ,  CASE WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 = 'Top SKU - Exception' THEN 'N'  /* OA Q4FY13 -<<< */
  WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N' END AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG 
  , CASE WHEN EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 <> 'Top SKU - Exception' THEN SATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,'UNKNOWN' EXCEPTION_REASON_CD  /* MODIFICATION AS PART OF SOT OA Q4FY16 */
 /* OA Q3FY13 <<<- */
  , 1 AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT
  , EORCTLI.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                   
  , 'I' DML_TYPE    
  FROM
  $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_ITM EORCTLI
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT
  ON (EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AND EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME=EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON(EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
  
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (EORCTLI.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
                                                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    
	ON (EORCTLI.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
     ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
   
 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR
   ON (EORCTLI.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
   AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
   ON (SORR.NAME = NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
   ON (NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
 /* OA Q3FY13 ->>> */
   LEFT JOIN 
  (SELECT CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, EXTENDED_AMOUNT,INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES 
  UNION
  SELECT CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, EXTENDED_AMOUNT,INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_ITM
  )SOR
  ON EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SOR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 = SOR.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6
   LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL1
  ON(SOR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL1.SS_CODE)
  
 /* OA Q3FY13 -<<< */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
   ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
 
   WHERE EORCTLI.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI' AND EORCTLI.LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') <> 'FREIGHT'

SELECT 
SORCTL.BATCH_ID,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15, 
SORCTL.ORG_ID, 
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, 
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, 
SORCTL.REASON_CODE, 
SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED, 
SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED, 
SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE, 
SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE, 
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, 
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE, 
SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6, 
SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT, 
SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID, 
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15, 
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION, 
SORCTL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG, 
SORCTL.CREATED_BY, 
SORCTL.DESCRIPTION, 
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8, 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9, 
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SORCTL.LINE_NUMBER, 
SORCTL.PAYMENT_SET_ID, 
SORCTL.QUANTITY_ORDERED, 
SORCTL.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG, 
SORCTL.TAX_PRECEDENCE, 
SORCTL.TAX_RATE, 
SORCTL.TAXABLE_AMOUNT, 
SORCTL.UOM_CODE, 
SORCTL.WAREHOUSE_ID,
SORCTL.CREATION_DATE,
SORCTL.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
SORCTL.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE7,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2,             
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE8  ,                       
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9        ,                 
SORCTL.REVENUE_AMOUNT   
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE 
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE'
AND
(
NOT EXISTS 
	( 
	SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC	
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	WHERE SORR.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SORR.RULE_ID = SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
	AND SORR.NAME=NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE	= NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY	= NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE	= NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE
	)
)

SELECT
     SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
     ,(CASE WHEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) WHEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN COALESCE(NP2.ITEM_KEY,-998) ELSE -998 END) PRODUCT_KEY                   
     ,CASE WHEN NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ='UNKNOWN'  THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'  END RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_ROLE       
     ,SORCTL.UOM_CODE RU_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE       
     ,SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE RU_UNIT_STD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT   
     ,CASE WHEN SORCTL.CREATION_DATE  >= '2021-11-05 00:00:00'  AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'ICMS-ADJ' ) AND INSTR(TRIM(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1),'-',1,2)=7 THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
	 ELSE SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE END AS RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
      ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV','DEP') THEN SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY             
     ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV','DEP') THEN SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT          
     ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV','DEP') THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT      
     ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY            
     ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT         
     ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE 0.000000 END RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     
     ,NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
     ,CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV','DEP') THEN 'DEBIT' END AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   
     ,CASE WHEN SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL THEN 'MONEY ONLY' ELSE 'PRODUCT' END MONEY_ONLY_TYPE               
     ,SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
     ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE  
     ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
     ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
     ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
     ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
     ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4 AS REVENUE_SOURCE_CD 
     ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3 AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_NOTE_TXT
     ,SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION   

     
  , CASE WHEN SORCTL.REASON_CODE like '%BLIND%DISC%' and  (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ'))THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
	 WHEN EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN 
('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
	 OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE ANY ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','OM-FBINV%')
      THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') 
     WHEN (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ')
           AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN('SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
           AND  SORCTL.REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER'  ) THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') 
		   WHEN SORCTL.CREATION_DATE >= '2021-11-05 00:00:00' AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'ICMS-ADJ' ) AND INSTR(TRIM(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1),'-',1,2)=7 THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
		   ELSE NULL END RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_START_DT
        , CASE WHEN SORCTL.REASON_CODE like '%BLIND%DISC%' and  (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ'))THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
	 WHEN EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  
( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
      OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE ANY ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','OM-FBINV%')
	  THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') 
     WHEN (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ')
           AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN('SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
           AND  SORCTL.REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER'  ) THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') 
		   WHEN SORCTL.CREATION_DATE  >= '2021-11-05 00:00:00'  AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'ICMS-ADJ' ) AND INSTR(TRIM(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2),'-',1,2)=7 THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
		   ELSE NULL END RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_END_DT
		   
    ,COALESCE(CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' AND  NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') 
       THEN 0.000000 
            WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') 
      AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('Top SKU' , 'Top SKU - Exception') 
       THEN 
     SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE11
      ELSE 0.000000 END,0.000000) AS RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT     
    ,COALESCE(CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM') 
       THEN 0.000000 
            WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM') 
      AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('Top SKU', 'Top SKU - Exception') 
       THEN  SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE11 
      ELSE 0.000000 END,0.000000) AS RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT   
     ,CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND  SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' THEN 'Y'  
      WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution'  AND  (SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 <> 'Top SKU' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'N'
      ELSE '=' END WITH_PARENT_ROLE         
     ,CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 = 'Top SKU - Exception' THEN 'N'  
      WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' THEN 'Y' 
       ELSE 'N' END AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG   
     ,CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 <> 'Top SKU - Exception' THEN COALESCE(SATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,-7777) ELSE SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     ,'UNKNOWN' EXCEPTION_REASON_CD 
     , CASE WHEN SORCTL.CREATION_DATE  >= '2021-11-05 00:00:00'  AND  EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'ICMS-ADJ' ) AND INSTR(TRIM(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2),'-',1,2)=7 THEN CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
	 ELSE SORCTL.RULE_END_DATE END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
    
	, CASE 
	WHEN (LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' OR INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%')  THEN COALESCE(CAST(LINE_EXTN.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'),CAST(SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'))
	WHEN (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  
	 ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
	 OR (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS')))
   THEN CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13 AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')
   WHEN  LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') THEN CAST(LINE_EXTN.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')
    ELSE NULL END AS MONTHLY_CHARGE_START_DT
	
     , CASE 
	 WHEN (LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' OR INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%') THEN COALESCE(CAST(LINE_EXTN.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'),CAST(SORCTL.RULE_END_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'))
	 WHEN (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN 
	 ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
	  OR (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS')))
       THEN CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14 AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')
	   WHEN LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') THEN CAST(LINE_EXTN.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')
    ELSE NULL END AS MONTHLY_CHARGE_END_DT


    , CASE WHEN (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
	 OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')
	 OR (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS')))
    THEN CAST(COALESCE(SUBSTR(CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE5 AS VARCHAR(150)), 1, INDEX(ATTRIBUTE5, '.')+15),0) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
ELSE 0.000000 END AS UNIT_NET_PRICE
    ,CASE WHEN (SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND 
 (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')  
 OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')
 OR (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))) )  
       THEN CAST(COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
     WHEN (SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND (
     INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') 
     OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN 'BSFT-OPL')	 )  
    THEN CAST(COALESCE(LINE_EXTN_CDC.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7))    
    ELSE 0.000000 END UNIT_LIST_PRICE 
    ,CASE WHEN (SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND 
 (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') 
 OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')
 OR (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))) )  
           THEN CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM') 
                            THEN CAST(COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.AMORTIZED_SUBSC_CREDIT_AMOUNT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0.000000 END 
    WHEN (SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND 
    (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN 'BSFT-OPL') )  
       THEN CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM')  
                            THEN CAST(COALESCE(LINE_EXTN_CDC.AMORTIZED_SUBSC_CREDIT_AMOUNT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0.000000 END 
                 ELSE 0.000000 END CREDIT_PURC_ADJSTMT_TRXL_AMT   
    ,CASE WHEN  (SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND 
 (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') 
 OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')
 OR (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))) ) 
           THEN CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','DM') 
                            THEN CAST(COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.AMORTIZED_SUBSC_CREDIT_AMOUNT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0.000000 END 
    WHEN  (SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND  (
    INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN 'BSFT-OPL'))   
           THEN CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','DM') 
                            THEN CAST(COALESCE(LINE_EXTN_CDC.AMORTIZED_SUBSC_CREDIT_AMOUNT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE 0.000000 END
                 ELSE 0.000000 END DEBIT_PURC_ADJSTMT_TRXL_AMT                     
                 ,CASE WHEN (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') 
				  OR (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))) 
     THEN COALESCE(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE11,'UNKNOWN')
     WHEN (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('CSP-MARKETPLACE' ) OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) THEN COALESCE(INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3 ,'UNKNOWN')
	 ELSE 'UNKNOWN'       END AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID
     ,CASE WHEN (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
	 OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-ICMS')
	 OR (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))) 
         THEN COALESCE(NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-6666) 
                                 ELSE -6666 END AS EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY 
	,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.PRICING_TERM,1) AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT  
	,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.ATTRIBUTE12,'N') AS TSV_ACCRUAL_FLG 
	,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.ATTRIBUTE13,'UNKNOWN') AS REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME 
	,COALESCE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME 
	,CASE WHEN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'T4C%' THEN CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') 
	 ELSE NULL END TERMINATION_DT
 ,SORCTL.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE 
     ,'I' DML_TYPE  
     FROM
     $$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT
     ON (EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AND EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME=SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
      ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
      ON(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
      AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
      ON (SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
            AND       SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    
   ON (  SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
   
   
   
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR
      ON (SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
      AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME)
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
      ON (SORR.NAME = NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME)
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
      ON (NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
      AND NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
      AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
   ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN_CDC
 ON (LINE_EXTN_CDC.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
 AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' )  
	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO 
WHERE MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD IN ('SBP','OPL') 
AND (COALESCE(SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)>0)
AND ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD<>'DELETED'

	,CASE WHEN EORCTLI.REASON_CODE like '%BLIND%DISC%' and  (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ'))THEN CAST(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
     WHEN EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')

OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE ANY ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','OM-FBINV%')
       THEN CAST(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
     WHEN (EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ')
          AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10 IN('SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
          AND  EORCTLI.REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER'  ) THEN CAST(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') 
		  WHEN EORCTLI.CREATION_DATE  >= '2021-11-05 00:00:00'  AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT IN  ( 'ICMS-ADJ' ) AND INSTR(TRIM(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE2),'-',1,2)=7 THEN CAST(EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')
		  ELSE NULL END RU_REV_TRNSFR_CNTRCT_END_DT
   /* OA Q1FY15 */

     , CASE

       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 

  

    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR
     ON (EORCTLI.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
     AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME)
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
     ON (SORR.NAME = NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME)
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT
     ON (NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
     AND NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
     AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)

   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
   ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID   
     AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN_CDC
 ON (LINE_EXTN_CDC.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
 AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' )  

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO 
WHERE MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD IN ('SBP','OPL') 
AND (COALESCE(SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)>0)
AND ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD<>'DELETED'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY NSO.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID  ORDER BY NSO.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD ASC,NSO.ORDER_DATETIME DESC)=1 )NSO
    ON NSO.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID=CASE WHEN (INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('CSP-MARKETPLACE' )OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS')) THEN EORCTLI.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3 ELSE EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE11 END                    
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (
/* get the TOP SKU Cust Trx Line Id */
   SELECT  EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, 
    EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
    EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME,
    CASE WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('SERVICE RMA','T4C SALES ADJ') 
     THEN CAST(CAST(ELOM.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(150)) 
    ELSE EORCTLI.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 
    END AS ORDER_LINE_ID
   FROM 
     $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTLI
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
    ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND NAT.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   LEFT  JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN ELOM
    ON ( EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  =  ELOM.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
     AND EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME     =  ELOM.GLOBAL_NAME 
    )
   AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9 = 'TOP SKU'
   WHERE EORCTLI.GLOBAL_NAME IN ('CG' , 'CDC') 
   ) SOR
  ON EORCTLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SOR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND EORCTLI.ATTRIBUTE9=SOR.ORDER_LINE_ID
      LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL1
     ON(SOR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
     AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL1.SS_CODE)
    /* OA Q1FY15 -<<< */
    WHERE EORCTLI.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
    AND EORCTLI.LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND (COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') <> 'FREIGHT'OR COALESCE(NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') <> 'FREIGHT')
